subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory. Set thy face toward the Ultimate Goal and the Most Exalted Summit, that thou mayest visit on behalf of those [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی ان اقصد المقصد الاقصی و الذروه العلیا لتزور نیابه لمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for pilgrims, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
